---
title: "Northvolt"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Info

## Libraries

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(googlesheets4)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(gganimate)
library(ggimage)
library(shiny)
library(leaflet)
library(ggrepel)
library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)
```

## Accessing data from the google sheets

```{r}
#| echo: false
gs4_auth(scopes = c("https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets", "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive"))

sheet <- gs4_get("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1iWwUMKtqyEcwFUpJwv5PO1NDM4QgJX9_snzBHYOZpYs/edit?gid=0#gid=0")

articles <- read_sheet(sheet, "electrive")
articles_nv_raw <- read_sheet(sheet, "Northvolt")
annual_reports <- read_sheet(sheet,"Årsredovisningar")
factories_raw <- read_sheet(sheet, "Materialisering")
```

## Filtering the articles

```{r}
#| echo: false
articles_nv <- articles_nv_raw %>% 
  filter(!(comment %in% c("duplicate","out of scope","speculation")))  %>%  
  select(ID, date, Event, `In annual reports`, Category, comment,`Theoretical category`,`Group 1`, `Group 2`)  %>% 
  arrange(date)  %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),ypos = rep(c(0.3, -0.3), length.out = n()))
```

## Electrive

### Interactive timeline plot

#### "Theoretical categories"

```{r}
pl_teor_cat <- articles_nv %>% 
  mutate(`Theoretical category` = fct_rev(fct_reorder(`Theoretical category`, date, .fun = min)))%>%
  ggplot(aes(date, `Theoretical category`, color = `Theoretical category`, 
             text= str_wrap(Event, 20))) + 
  geom_point(show.legend = F)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date("2024-06-20"), linetype = "dashed", color = "lightgrey") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date("2025-03-12"), linetype = "dashed", color = "lightgrey") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  labs(x = "Date", y = "") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plotly_pl_teor_cat <- ggplotly(pl_teor_cat, tooltip = "text") %>%
  style(hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = "white"), traces = NULL) %>%
  layout(hoverlabel = list(align = "left"))
plotly_pl_teor_cat
#saveWidget(plotly_pl_teor_cat, "northvolt_interactive_theor.html") 

```
#### 16 Categories

```{r}
#sorts the categories in alphabetic order for the plot
articles_nv$Category <- factor(articles_nv$Category,
  levels = rev(sort(unique(articles_nv$Category))))

ggplot(articles_nv, aes(x = date, y = Category, color = Category)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Northvolt Timeline",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Category"  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
#ggsave("northvolt_timeline.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```

#### 7 Categories (Group 1)

```{r}
#plotting all events on the x-axis
ggplot(articles_nv, aes(x = date, y = 0, color = `Group 1`)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Northvolt Timeline",
    x = "Date",
    y = NULL,
    color = NULL) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y = element_blank())

#sorting the events in 2 groups, 2018-2021 & 2022-2026
articles_nv <- articles_nv  %>% 
  mutate(period = ifelse(year(date) <= 2021, "2018–2021", "2022–2026"))

ggplot(articles_nv, aes(x = date, y = 0, color = `Group 1`)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ period, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(title = "Northvolt Timeline",
    x = "Date",
    y = NULL,
    color = NULL) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        axis.line.y = element_blank())+
  theme(panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"))
#ggsave("northvolt_timeline_group1.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```

#### Rise & Fall (Group 2)

```{r}
articles_nv$`Group 2` <- factor(articles_nv$`Group 2`,
  levels = c("Rise", "Neutral", "Fall"))


ggplot() +
  geom_jitter(data = subset(articles_nv, `Group 2` != "Rise"),
    aes(x = date, y = 0, color = `Group 2`),
    height = 0, size = 4, alpha = 0.7  ) +
  geom_jitter(data = subset(articles_nv, `Group 2` == "Rise"),
    aes(x = date, y = 0, color = `Group 2`),
    height = 0, size = 4, alpha = 0.7  ) +
  labs(title = "Northvolt Timeline",
    x = "Date",
    y = NULL,
    color = NULL) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Rise"    = "#1b9e77",
    "Neutral" = "#999999",  
    "Fall"    = "#d95f02")) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
#ggsave("northvolt_timeline_rise_fall.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Annual reports

### Interactive timeline plot

```{r}
pl_ar <- annual_reports %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(Date),`Theoretical category` = factor(`Theoretical category`,
           levels = rev(c("Actors", "Money", "Materialization", "Policy", "Discourse", "Knowledge", "Other")))) %>%
  arrange(date)  %>%
  ggplot(aes(date, `Theoretical category`, color = `Theoretical category`, 
             text= str_wrap(Event, 20))) + 
  geom_jitter(height = 0.2, width = 0, show.legend = FALSE)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date("2024-06-20"), linetype = "dashed", color = "lightgrey") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date("2025-03-12"), linetype = "dashed", color = "lightgrey") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  labs(x = "Date", y = "") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(legend.position = "none")

plotly_pl_ar <- ggplotly(pl_ar, tooltip = "text") %>%
  style(hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = "white"), traces = NULL) %>%
  plotly::layout(hoverlabel = list(align = "left"))

plotly_pl_ar
#saveWidget(plotly_pl_ar, "northvolt_interactive_ar.html")

```

## Factories/Materialization

### Static map

```{r}
#| echo: false
#converts all dates into years and reshape the data
factories <- factories_raw %>%
  mutate(`First announcement` = year(`First announcement`),
    Acquisition = year(Acquisition)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(
      `First announcement`,
      `Start construction`,
      `Start operation`,
      Acquisition),
    names_to = "event_type",
    values_to = "year") %>%
  filter(!is.na(year))

#determines the status of the factory (planned, construction, operational)
latest_status <- factories %>%
  mutate(status_rank = case_when(
      event_type == "First announcement" ~ 1,
      event_type == "Start construction" ~ 2,
      event_type == "Start operation" ~ 3,
      event_type == "Acquisition" ~ 3,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_)) %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  slice_max(status_rank, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(status = case_when(
      status_rank == 1 ~ "Planned",
      status_rank == 2 ~ "Construction",
      status_rank == 3 ~ "Operational"),
    status = factor(status,
      levels = c(
        "Planned",
        "Construction",
        "Operational")))


#slightly offset the factories that are located at the same plant
latest_status <- latest_status %>%
  mutate(Lon_plot = case_when(
      Name == "Revolt Ett" ~ Lon + 0.30,
      Name == "Northvolt Dwa ESS" ~ Lon + 0.25,
      TRUE ~ Lon),
    Lat_plot = case_when(
      Name == "Revolt Ett" ~ Lat + 0.20,
      Name == "Northvolt Dwa ESS" ~ Lat + 0.20,
      TRUE ~ Lat))

#split sites between Europe and North America
europe_sites <- latest_status %>%
  filter(Lon_plot >= -50)

na_sites <- latest_status %>%
  filter(Lon_plot < -50)

#world map
world <- ne_countries(
  scale = "medium",
  returnclass = "sf")

#Europe map
europe_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = world,
    fill = "#C9DFE0",
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_point(
    data = europe_sites,
    aes(x = Lon_plot, y = Lat_plot, fill = status),
    shape = 21,
    size = 4,
    colour = "black",
    stroke = 0.5) +
  geom_text_repel(data = europe_sites,
    aes(x = Lon_plot, y = Lat_plot, label = Name),
    size = 3.5,
    segment.color = "grey70",
    max.overlaps = Inf) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Planned" = "#A6CEE3",
      "Construction" = "#4F86C6",
      "Operational" = "#08306B")) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        shape = 21,
        colour = "black",
        size = 5))) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-15, 35), ylim = c(35, 72), expand = F) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.box.margin = margin(0,0,0,0))


#map of North America, used as an inset to the Europe map
na_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = world,
    fill = "#C9DFE0",
    color = "white",
    linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_point(data = na_sites,
    aes(x = Lon_plot,y = Lat_plot,fill = status),
    shape = 21,
    size = 4,
    colour = "black",
    stroke = 0.5) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = na_sites,
    aes(x = Lon_plot, y = Lat_plot, label = Name),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = Inf) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Planned" = "#A6CEE3",
      "Construction" = "#4F86C6",
      "Operational" = "#08306B")) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-130, -60), ylim = c(25, 60)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(
      colour = "#08306B",
      fill = NA,
      linewidth = 1))


#combining the maps
final_map <- europe_map +
  inset_element(na_map,
    left = 0.0,
    bottom = 0.60,
    right = 0.40,
    top = 1)

final_map
#save the map
#ggsave("northvolt_factories_map.png", final_map, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg="white")
```

### Shiny map

```{r}


#preparing the data
factories <- factories_raw %>%
  mutate(`First announcement` = year(`First announcement`),
    Acquisition = year(Acquisition)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(
      `First announcement`,
      `Start construction`,
      `Start operation`,
      Acquisition),
    names_to = "event_type",
    values_to = "year") %>%
  filter(!is.na(year)) %>%
  
  # Cuberg only appears after acquisition
  filter(!(Name == "Cuberg" &
        event_type %in% c(
          "First announcement",
          "Start construction",
          "Start operation")))

years <- sort(unique(factories$year))

# UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Northvolt Materialization"),
  sliderInput(
    "year",
    "Timeline:",
    min = min(years),
    max = max(years),
    value = min(years),
    step = 1,
    sep = "",
    animate = animationOptions(
      interval = 1500,
      loop = FALSE
    )
  ),
  
  tags$div(
    style = "
      text-align:center;
      font-size:28px;
      font-weight:bold;
      margin-bottom:15px;
    ",
    textOutput("selected_year")),
  
  leafletOutput(
    "map",
    height = "800px"))

# SERVER
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  output$selected_year <- renderText({
    paste("Year:", input$year)})
  
  output$map <- renderLeaflet({
    
    leaflet() %>%
      
      addProviderTiles(
        providers$Esri.WorldGrayCanvas) %>%
      
      # Europe-focused starting view
      fitBounds(
        lng1 = -15,
        lat1 = 35,
        lng2 = 40,
        lat2 = 72) %>%
      
      addLegend(position = "topright",
        colors = c(
          "#A6CEE3",
          "#4F86C6",
          "#08306B"),
        labels = c(
          "Planned",
          "Construction",
          "Operational"),
        title = "Status")})
  
  observe({
    
    status_data <- factories %>%
      
      mutate(
        status_rank = case_when(
          event_type == "First announcement" ~ 1,
          event_type == "Start construction" ~ 2,
          event_type == "Start operation" ~ 3,
          event_type == "Acqusition" ~ 3)) %>%
      
      filter(year <= input$year) %>%
      
      group_by(Name) %>%
      
      slice_max(
        status_rank,
        n = 1,
        with_ties = FALSE) %>%
      
      ungroup() %>%
      
      mutate(status = case_when(
          status_rank == 1 ~ "Planned",
          status_rank == 2 ~ "Construction",
          status_rank == 3 ~ "Operational"),
        
        color = case_when(
          status == "Planned" ~ "#A6CEE3",
          status == "Construction" ~ "#4F86C6",
          status == "Operational" ~ "#08306B"),
        
        # Point placement
        Lon_plot = case_when(
          Name == "Revolt Ett" ~ Lon + 0.35,
          Name == "Northvolt Ett" ~ Lon - 0.35,
          Name == "Northvolt Dwa ESS" ~ Lon + 0.30,
          Name == "Northvolt Dwa Industrial" ~ Lon - 0.30,
          TRUE ~ Lon),
        
        Lat_plot = case_when(
          Name == "Revolt Ett" ~ Lat + 0.15,
          Name == "Northvolt Ett" ~ Lat - 0.15,
          Name == "Northvolt Dwa ESS" ~ Lat + 0.10,
          Name == "Northvolt Dwa Industrial" ~ Lat - 0.10,
          TRUE ~ Lat),
        
        # Label placement
        Lon_label = case_when(
          Name == "Revolt Ett" ~ Lon_plot,
          Name == "Northvolt Ett" ~ Lon_plot,
          Name == "Northvolt Dwa ESS" ~ Lon_plot,
          Name == "Northvolt Dwa Industrial" ~ Lon_plot,
          Name == "Northvolt Drei" ~ Lon_plot - 0.30,
          TRUE ~ Lon_plot),
        
        Lat_label = case_when(
          Name == "Revolt Ett" ~ Lat_plot + 0.35,
          Name == "Northvolt Ett" ~ Lat_plot - 0.35,
          Name == "Northvolt Dwa ESS" ~ Lat_plot + 0.35,
          Name == "Northvolt Dwa Industrial" ~ Lat_plot - 0.35,
          Name == "Hydrovolt" ~ Lat_plot - 0.30,
          Name == "Northvolt Fem" ~ Lat_plot + 0.30,
          Name == "Northvolt Drei" ~ Lat_plot + 0.35,
          TRUE ~ Lat_plot + 0.20))
    
    if (nrow(status_data) == 0) return()
    
    leafletProxy("map") %>%
      
      clearMarkers() %>%
      clearShapes() %>%
      
      # Factory points
      addCircleMarkers(
        lng = status_data$Lon_plot,
        lat = status_data$Lat_plot,
        
        radius = 8,
        
        color = "black",
        weight = 1,
        
        fillColor = status_data$color,
        fillOpacity = 1,
        
        popup = paste0(
          "<b>", status_data$Name, "</b><br>",
          "Status: ", status_data$status, "<br>",
          "Year: ", status_data$year)) %>%
      
      # Labels as tiny markers
      addMarkers(
        lng = status_data$Lon_label,
        lat = status_data$Lat_label,
        
        icon = icons(
          iconUrl = "data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAD/ACwAAAAAAQABAAACADs=",
          iconWidth = 1,
          iconHeight = 1),
        
        label = status_data$Name,
        
        labelOptions = labelOptions(
          noHide = TRUE,
          textOnly = FALSE,
          style = list(
            "background-color" = "rgba(255,255,255,0.75)",
            "padding" = "2px 4px",
            "border-radius" = "3px",
            "font-size" = "12px",
            "color" = "black",
            "border" = "none",
            "box-shadow" = "none")))})}

# RUN APP
shinyApp(ui, server)
```
